summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions iteration 12. All features verified working: 1) RECRA logo (white PNG) visible in both Flow Selector header and main app header. 2) Energy Step (Step 4) fully functional with 3 modes: Grid (hides solar/battery), Hybrid (shows all options), Off-Grid (shows all options). 3) Solar panels: increment/decrement buttons, input field, recommended panels button working. 4) Batteries: increment/decrement buttons, input field, recommended batteries button working. 5) Extra options: Heat pump (€8,500), Solar boiler (€3,200), Water recycling (€12,000), Wind turbine (€6,500) checkboxes working. 6) Investment summary shows correct calculations (10 panels × €320 + 3 batteries × €2,800 + heat pump €8,500 = €20,100). 7) Power calculation displays peak kW, daily kWh, yearly kWh based on placed products. 8) Energy investment flows through to Step 5 Quote and right sidebar total. 9) Grid mode correctly hides energy investment from totals.
passed_tests: Frontend: RECRA logo (recra-logo-white.png) visible in Flow Selector header
Frontend: RECRA logo (recra-logo-white.png) visible in main app header
Frontend: Flow Selector page loads with 3 flow buttons (recreatie, chalet, fec)

Frontend: Energy mode Grid button present and clickable
Frontend: Energy mode Hybrid button present and clickable
Frontend: Energy mode Off-Grid button present and clickable
Frontend: Grid mode hides solar panels input
Frontend: Grid mode hides batteries input
Frontend: Hybrid mode shows solar panels input
Frontend: Hybrid mode shows batteries input
Frontend: Off-Grid mode shows solar panels input
Frontend: Off-Grid mode shows batteries input

Frontend: Solar panels plus button functional

Frontend: Recommended panels button applies value when clicked

Frontend: Energy investment summary displays correct total (€20,100 for 10 panels + 3 batteries + heat pump)
Frontend: Power calculation shows 'Piek verbruik' (peak consumption) in kW
Frontend: Power calculation shows 'Dagelijks verbruik' (daily consumption) in kWh
Frontend: Power calculation shows 'Jaarlijks verbruik' (yearly consumption) in kWh
Frontend: Right sidebar 'Totaal' includes energy investment when Hybrid/Off-Grid selected
Frontend: Right sidebar shows 'Incl. energie' line item with energy investment amount
Frontend: Step 5 Quote shows 'Energie-installatie' line item
Frontend: Step 5 Quote includes energy investment in total

Frontend: Solar coverage reaches 100% with recommended panels
Frontend: Battery autonomy hours displayed correctly
Frontend: Yearly savings and payback period displayed in investment summary
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all new features: 1) RECRA logo integration - white PNG logo (recra-logo-white.png) displayed in both Flow Selector header and main app header via img[alt='RECRA Solutions']. 2) Energy Step (Step 4) completely rebuilt with real calculations: solar panels (450Wp, €320/panel), LiFePO4 batteries (5kWh, €2,800/unit), heat pump (COP 3.5, €8,500), solar boiler (300L, €3,200), water recycling (€12,000), wind turbine (3kW, €6,500). 3) Power calculation based on placed products: sanitair=5000W, camera=15W, wifi=20W, etc. 4) Solar hours NL average 3.5, electricity rate €0.35/kWh. 5) energyInvestment calculated in App.js and passed as prop to Step5Quote and displayed in right sidebar. 6) Grid mode returns energyInvestment=0. 7) All data-testid attributes present: energy-mode-grid/hybrid/offgrid, solar-minus/plus, solar-panels-input, solar-recommend-btn, battery-minus/plus, batteries-input, battery-recommend-btn, energy-option-heat_pump/solar_boiler/water_recycling/wind_turbine, energy-total-investment.
